title: Broken's Anomalous Developments: BAD
description:
This mod adds mechanics and items from S.T.A.L.K.E.R. Anomaly and also some from my own ideas.

(Cooking up a similar new project rn prototype should be up around July-October,
          
                                                       BrokenKodiak)
body:
For a long time I have been wanting to remake or more so make something reminiscent of S.T.A.L.K.E.R. Anomaly in Minecraft to try and capture the feeling of those games and this mod is what I'm going to use to achieve that. It is very likely that I will eventually make a modpack including this mod to further this goal. If you don't know what S.T.A.L.K.E.R. or Anomaly is I highly suggest checking it out. I will be working on this mod for a long amount of time so expect to see more from it. For now I hope you enjoy.


- Available MC Versions: 1.20.1 Forge


- Beta Features: Radiation system, Anti-Rad Drugs, Uranium and Uranium ore (No current use), Radiation Poisoning, Geiger Counter (The Rad Meter doesn't show up until you get one), Radiation Meter, Research Table, and a Doctor Villager Profession (Uses the Research Table), Tobacco Plant, Tobacco Leaf, Dried Tobacco Leaf, Ground Tobacco, Cigarettes, and Mineboro Packs (Can contain Cigarettes).


- Planned Updates: ~~0.9.1: Cigarettes and Cigarette Packs~~|| 0.9.2: Alcohol and a few medical items|| 0.9.3: Nuclear wasteland biome and structures|| 0.9.4: A few more medical items and possibly a model/texture update and/or Faction Armour||


- Roadmap: ~~Q1-Q2 2025: YT Channel for Devlogs and showcases, 1.21 Update, and possible Fabric Port~~

**_I am temporarily discontinuing the mod as I work on some other projects including the independent development of a game and gaming videos. If you would like to see what I have been working on along side the first devlog once it is finished check out my YT Channel_**([https://www.youtube.com/@Broken_Kodiak](https://www.youtube.com/@Broken_Kodiak)).
